description_long: This is a modern, urban-style faucet with a tall, curved gooseneck spout and a single lever handle mounted on the side. The spout arches gracefully in a high arc, providing ample clearance for filling large containers or washing. The body and spout appear to be constructed from a dark, metallic material, likely powder-coated or anodized for durability and corrosion resistance. The handle is slim and ergonomically shaped, designed for easy operation with a single hand. The faucet's design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for installation in public parks, outdoor sinks, or urban utility areas. There are no visible hose attachments or sprayers, emphasizing its streamlined appearance.
description: A tall, dark metallic gooseneck faucet with a single side lever and a sleek, modern design. The high arc spout and minimalistic form make it ideal for urban outdoor or utility settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, cylindrical body and the single lever handle extending outward.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the full curve of the gooseneck spout and the open underside for water flow.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the lever handle visible and the spout arching away from the body.
description_view_3: Rear angled view emphasizing the continuous curve of the spout and the solid base.
